name: Orzo with Broccoli, Feta and Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook orzo in a pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite, about 8 minutes.
2. Add broccoli and cook until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a heavy small skillet over medium heat. Add pine nuts and stir until golden brown, about 3 minutes.
4. Add crushed red pepper and stir until aromatic, about 30 seconds. Remove mixture from heat.
5. Drain orzo and broccoli. Transfer to a large bowl. Pour the oil mixture over and toss to coat.
6. Add feta, olives, parmesan, and basil and toss to coat.
7. Season with salt and pepper and serve.
